title: microgramma nitida
intro: Microgramma nitida is a species of tree fern, native to South America, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Microgramma nitida include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and compresses.
